name: [HIGH] CVE-2026-31802
statusMessage: tar: tar: File overwrite via drive-relative symlink traversal
statusTrace: node-tar is a full-featured Tar for Node.js. Prior to version 7.5.11, tar (npm) can be tricked into creating a symlink that points outside the extraction directory by using a drive-relative symlink target such as C:../../../target.txt, which enables file overwrite outside cwd during normal tar.x() extraction. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.5.11.
